data.body: SCOPE CHANGE: two new stories added to epic mid-flight (both discovered_from bug 5e40, auto-lander epic f1fa): a37b-f1d3-ae2d-44b1 (courageous-pattern-queenbee — enable progressive drift-refresh by default: _config_schema.py flip + doc sweep + pinning/behavioral tests) and a8e5-6876-dcde-4d3d (gymnasial-nebulous-squamata — Pass-2 grounding hardening: absence-claim veto + DET content floor + operator-attested AC awareness; verify.py/decide.py kernel binaries + deterministic rules + prompts + det_floor.py + coach move + regression fixtures). Epic now 10 leaves (5 stories + 5 tasks). This churn was the source of the 'children changed' plan-review fingerprint drift on the epic. Heavy shared-file overlap in the plan-review kernel (decide.py, verify.py, passes.py, criteria_routing.json) => executing as ONE linear dependency-ordered Gerrit stack, not parallel worktrees.
